tracks.meaning: a position in a hierarchy or chain of command, such as the rank of captain or sergeant
a relative position or level in an ordered sequence from highest to lowest
to assign or determine a position in a hierarchy or sequence
to classify or rate according to quality, creditworthiness, or financial standing
a player's or team's position in a league or competition standings
growing or spreading thickly and coarsely, as in rank vegetation or rank hair
unpleasantly strong, stale, or offensive in smell or taste
the relative position or precedence of a legal claim or creditor in a bankruptcy or estate distribution
to sort or order data according to specified criteria or values
a person's social status, standing, or position within a group or organization
growing luxuriantly or excessively, as vegetation that is dense and overgrown
